title: Full-Stack Web Development
description: End-to-end monolithic web development. Building robust, fully integrated applications using ReactJS for dynamic interfaces and ExpressJS for solid backend logic, all seamlessly deployed on AWS.

title: Collaboration & Direction
description: Working alongside teams, clients, and stakeholders to take a project from idea to shipped — clear communication, honest timelines, and work that actually gets done.

title: Technical Research & Analysis
description: Conducting deep-dive technical feasibility studies and market research to identify the most efficient tools, architectures, and trends for long-term project success.

title: AI, Machine Learning & Deep Learning
description: Integrating intelligent capabilities into applications, from data preprocessing to deploying Deep Learning models that solve complex visual and predictive problems.
